description: Pinned seed corpus for Memory MCP mock test fixture. 20 synthetic note entries with varied data_class values for SV-MEM-03..05 weighting assertions.

notes.summary: User prefers Python for data analysis tasks.
Project timeline target is Q3 release.
API key rotation scheduled for 2026-05-15.
Team standups moved to 10am Tuesdays.
Dependency on canonicalize npm package for JCS.
User prefers verbose logging during debugging.
Conformance tests run on 3-platform CI matrix.
Agent Card schema includes activeMode enum.
HR-02 asserts budget projection over limit.
SV-PERM-01 asserts ReadOnly rejects Mutating.
Session bootstrap grants scopes per §12.6.
MANIFEST digest regenerated after fixture bump.
PDA signing uses Ed25519 per §6.1.1.
Token budget projection uses p95-over-W algorithm.
Cold-cache CI budget is 120 seconds on all platforms.
Audit chain uses SHA-256 per-record linkage.
Tool Registry entry carries risk_class and default_control.
Permission decision endpoint requires decide scope.
Resume algorithm runs at boot for in-progress sessions.
Conformance card ships with DangerFullAccess activeMode.
